name: Easy Taco Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a pan over medium heat until thoroughly cooked. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
2. Stir in the taco seasoning according to package instructions.
3. In a large serving bowl, combine the cooled beef mixture with shredded lettuce, chopped tomatoes, Catalina dressing, crushed corn chips, and shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Toss gently until all ingredients are well mixed.
5. Serve immediately.
